final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original medical education infographic for cardiovascular anatomy, featuring a 3D visualization of the human heart and vascular system.

Style/medium: highly realistic medical illustration combining Frank Netter anatomical precision with modern 3D rendering, photorealistic tissue textures, volumetric lighting
Subject: human heart with cross-sectional view revealing all four chambers (left/right atrium, left/right ventricle), cardiac valves, aorta, pulmonary artery, superior/inferior vena cava; coronary arteries highlighted in gold on heart surface; myocardial fiber texture visible
Scene/backdrop: dark gradient background to maximize anatomical structure visibility, clinical educational setting
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting from upper left, subtle internal glow within chambers, focused illumination on cardiac structures against deep shadow
Color palette: arterial system in vivid red, venous system in deep blue, coronary arteries in gold highlight, neutral anatomical tones for myocardium, dark charcoal background
Materials/textures: realistic cardiac muscle striations, smooth endothelial surfaces on vessels, semi-translucent valve leaflets, glossy blood flow visualization
Composition: three-quarter anterior view of heart, cutaway section showing internal chambers, arrows and light effects indicating blood flow direction, generous margin areas for text annotation placement
Constraints: must maintain anatomical accuracy for medical education; clear visual hierarchy between arterial and venous systems; text annotation space preserved on all sides
Avoid: cartoonish simplification, oversaturated colors, cluttered composition without breathing room, generic stock medical illustration style, watermarks
